title: The Strategy of Conflict
author: Thomas Schelling
content: “The power to hurt is bargaining power. To exploit it is diplomacy.”
action: Use leverage as a diplomatic tool.

title: Game Theory
author: Drew Fudenberg & Jean Tirole
content: “In a non-cooperative game, players maximize their utility based on the anticipated moves of others.”
action: Anticipate adversary moves based on self-interest.

title: The Evolution of Cooperation
author: Robert Axelrod
content: “Tit-for-tat is the most robust strategy in the iterated prisoner's dilemma.”

title: Theory of Games and Economic Behavior
author: John von Neumann & Oskar Morgenstern
content: “The zero-sum game is a conflict where one player's gain is exactly equal to the other player's loss.”

title: Prisoner's Dilemma
author: William Poundstone
content: “The paradox is that individual rationality leads to collective irrationality.”
action: Audit alliances for destructive hidden incentives.
